beats.title: Into the Labyrinth
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens with the party recovering from the prior fight, choosing an entrance, and probing the first branching tunnels until they reach the warmer chamber split by a dark crack.
dateEvidence: session.yaml sets drStart and drEnd to 1730-01-25
the DM says the party has already taken its short rest when the session begins
the transcript resumes directly from the prior exploration with no sleep, long rest, or next-day cue

beats.title: The Booming Fissure
beats.boundaryReason: In the warm room the party studies the chasm-like split, tests the icy fern growth, triggers worsening wind and heat from below, and finally commits to crossing after the first failed leap.
dateEvidence: this beat follows immediately from the opening exploration on the same continuous delve
the party is still acting under the same post-short-rest momentum with no rest or sleep transition
the transcript gives no explicit sunset, dusk, or next-day signal before the crossing attempt

beats.title: Past the Storm Gate
beats.boundaryReason: After organizing the crossing, the group forces everyone through the booming barrier, adapts to the shifting passages beyond it, and presses forward until a frozen side chamber appears.
dateEvidence: the crossing and the deeper exploration are continuous with the previous beat
no rest, sleep, sunrise, or other day-change marker occurs during the move beyond the fissure
the only time progression shown is short-term traversal through the same labyrinth on 1730-01-25

beats.title: Questions for the Dead
beats.boundaryReason: The party discovers a frozen corpse, uses Speak with Dead to learn about Melusa, Zeyfa's sacrifice cycle, and the trapped soul, then gathers gear and relics before moving on.
dateEvidence: the corpse chamber is reached directly after the storm-gate traversal with no interruption in the same expedition
the questioning, history check, and looting all happen before any rest or overnight pause
the transcript still provides no cue that the date has advanced beyond 1730-01-25

beats.title: The Looping White Maze
beats.boundaryReason: The party leaves the corpse behind, follows booming corridors into impossible loops, glimpses wind-formed hunters, and finally sneaks through the collapsing maze into calmer passage.
dateEvidence: this beat begins immediately after the corpse investigation and remains part of the same uninterrupted delve
the party discusses worsening cold and whiteout conditions but never stops for a rest or sleep
escaping the loop happens on the same day because no transcript evidence supports a date advance

beats.title: Toward Zeyfa's Minion
beats.boundaryReason: Beyond the maze, the group retraces the booming gap, descends into a deeper circular chamber, hides Kalima, and ends on the cliffhanger reveal of the shaggy beast and its ice-born shadows as they prepare for initiative.
dateEvidence: the party comes straight out of the looping maze and continues deeper with no break in the expedition
Kalima's warning and the cliffhanger initiative call occur before any rest, camp, or next-morning cue
session.yaml still bounds the entire session to 1730-01-25 and nothing in the transcript contradicts that
